---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.documentElement.classList.add("js-typing");
</script>
```

::: {.homepage-shell}
::: {.hero-card}
::: {.hero-grid}
::: {.hero-copy}
::: {.name-row .intro-item .intro-delay-2}
## Nykko Vitali

::: {.brain-orb aria-hidden="true"}
<model-viewer
  src="files/pinkbrain.glb"
  alt="3D brain model"
  auto-rotate
  rotation-per-second="9deg"
  camera-orbit="20deg 75deg 150%"
  min-camera-orbit="auto auto 150%"
  max-camera-orbit="auto auto 150%"
  field-of-view="22deg"
  min-field-of-view="22deg"
  max-field-of-view="22deg"
  exposure="0.9"
  shadow-intensity="0"
  interaction-prompt="none"
  loading="eager"
>
</model-viewer>
<span class="brain-tooltip">That's me!</span>
:::
:::

::: {.hero-bio}
<p class="type-reveal" data-type-speed="24">I am a PhD student in Psychology at Harvard University. I work primarily with Jason Mitchell and Mahzarin R. Banaji.</p>
:::

::: {.hero-bio}
<p class="type-reveal" data-type-speed="24">My research program is bi-directional. On one end, I combine behavioral experiments and computational modeling to study how people metacognitively evaluate information, update their beliefs, and what cues they focus on in digital environments. On the other, I am quite interested in exploring what aspects of human cognition have seeped into the weights of LLMs, and how aligned they are with human behavior.</p>
:::

::: {.hero-bio}
<p class="type-reveal" data-type-speed="24">I also love stand-up comedy, building tools for various applications, and the manga One Piece :)</p>
:::

:::

::: {.hero-panel .intro-item .intro-delay-5}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-image}

::: {.panel-note}
**Current Focus**

Human-AI interaction and belief updating during uncertainty & Reasoning inconsistencies in LLMs
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.spotlight-grid}
::: {.spotlight-column .spotlight-column-publication}
## Publication Spotlight {.section-title}

::: {.publication-card}
**Lehr, S. A., Saichandran, K. S., Harmon-Jones, E., Vitali, N., & Banaji, M. R. (2025).**  
*Kernels of selfhood: GPT-4o shows humanlike patterns of cognitive dissonance moderated by free choice.*  
*Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences*, 122(20), e2501823122.  
[Read the paper](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2501823122){.publication-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.spotlight-column .spotlight-column-poster}
## Recent Poster Presentation {.section-title}

::: {.poster-card}
```{=html}
<div class="poster-meta-row">
  <span class="poster-subtitle">Presented at Society for Personality and Social Psychology, February, 2026</span>
  <a class="poster-link" href="files/recent-poster.pdf" target="_blank">Open full poster (PDF)</a>
</div>
```

<iframe class="poster-preview" src="files/recent-poster.pdf#view=FitH" title="Recent poster presentation PDF preview" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::
:::
:::

## Side Projects {.section-title}

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### ClaudeR
R MCP integration for interactive, agent-assisted coding in RStudio.
[View repository](https://github.com/IMNMV/ClaudeR){.project-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### A Quantitative Comaprison of Wikipedia vs. Grokipedia
A comparative project exploring information quality and narrative framing across model-generated and encyclopedia-style content.
[View repository](https://github.com/IMNMV/wikipediavsgrokipedia){.project-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(() => {
  const initMotion = () => {
    const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;

    const revealLines = document.querySelectorAll(".type-reveal");
    const animateTypedLine = (el, done) => {
      const fullText = el.dataset.fullText || el.textContent.trim();
      const baseSpeed = Number(el.dataset.typeSpeed || 14);

      el.dataset.fullText = fullText;
      el.textContent = "";

      let i = 0;
      el.classList.add("typewriter-active");

      const tick = () => {
        if (i >= fullText.length) {
          el.classList.remove("typewriter-active");
          el.classList.add("typewriter-done");
          done();
          return;
        }

        i += 1;
        el.textContent = fullText.slice(0, i);
        const ch = fullText[i - 1];
        const extraPause = /[.,;:!?]/.test(ch) ? baseSpeed * 4 : 0;
        window.setTimeout(tick, baseSpeed + extraPause);
      };

      tick();
    };

    const nameHeading = document.querySelector(".name-row h2");
    if (nameHeading && !nameHeading.dataset.maskInit) {
      const rawName = nameHeading.textContent.trim();
      nameHeading.dataset.maskInit = "true";
      nameHeading.textContent = "";

      for (const ch of rawName) {
        const span = document.createElement("span");
        span.className = ch === " " ? "name-gap" : "name-char";
        span.textContent = ch;
        nameHeading.appendChild(span);
      }
    }

    const nameChars = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".name-row .name-char"));
    let nameMaskStarted = false;
    const startNameMaskEffect = () => {
      if (nameMaskStarted || prefersReducedMotion || nameChars.length === 0) return;
      nameMaskStarted = true;

      const triggerMaskPulse = () => {
        const pulseSize = Math.random() < 0.72 ? 1 : 2;
        const picked = new Set();

        while (picked.size < pulseSize) {
          picked.add(Math.floor(Math.random() * nameChars.length));
        }

        picked.forEach((idx) => {
          const charEl = nameChars[idx];
          if (!charEl) return;
          charEl.classList.add("is-masked");
          const revealAfter = 130 + Math.random() * 290;
          window.setTimeout(() => {
            charEl.classList.remove("is-masked");
          }, revealAfter);
        });

        const nextPulse = 860 + Math.random() * 1960;
        window.setTimeout(triggerMaskPulse, nextPulse);
      };

      const initialDelay = 1200 + Math.random() * 1200;
      window.setTimeout(triggerMaskPulse, initialDelay);
    };

    if (revealLines.length > 0) {
      if (prefersReducedMotion) {
        revealLines.forEach((line) => {
          const fullText = line.dataset.fullText || line.textContent.trim();
          line.dataset.fullText = fullText;
          line.textContent = fullText;
          line.classList.remove("typewriter-active");
          line.classList.add("typewriter-done");
        });
        startNameMaskEffect();
      } else {
        revealLines.forEach((line) => {
          const fullText = line.dataset.fullText || line.textContent.trim();
          line.dataset.fullText = fullText;
          line.textContent = "";
        });

        let idx = 0;
        const runNext = () => {
          if (idx >= revealLines.length) {
            startNameMaskEffect();
            return;
          }
          animateTypedLine(revealLines[idx], () => {
            idx += 1;
            window.setTimeout(runNext, 220);
          });
        };
        window.setTimeout(runNext, 420);
      }
    } else {
      startNameMaskEffect();
    }

    const brainOrb = document.querySelector(".brain-orb");
    if (!brainOrb || prefersReducedMotion) {
      return;
    }

    const maxTilt = 6;

    brainOrb.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      const rect = brainOrb.getBoundingClientRect();
      const px = (event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
      const py = (event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
      const tiltY = (px - 0.5) * (maxTilt * 2);
      const tiltX = (0.5 - py) * (maxTilt * 2);

      brainOrb.style.setProperty("--brain-tilt-x", `${tiltX.toFixed(2)}deg`);
      brainOrb.style.setProperty("--brain-tilt-y", `${tiltY.toFixed(2)}deg`);
    });

    brainOrb.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
      brainOrb.style.setProperty("--brain-tilt-x", "0deg");
      brainOrb.style.setProperty("--brain-tilt-y", "0deg");
    });
  };

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", initMotion, { once: true });
  } else {
    initMotion();
  }
})();
</script>
```
